steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with title 'Mission Board', connected status shown

steps.expected: Columns: backlog, ready, in_progress, review, done, blocked
steps.observed: All 6 columns present: Backlog (3), Ready (2), In Progress (2), Review (2), Done (1), Blocked (2)

evidence.observations: Dashboard loaded successfully at http://localhost:3201 showing a Kanban board with all 6 status columns (Backlog, Ready, In Progress, Review, Done, Blocked). Page title is 'Mission Board'. A 'Connected' status indicator was visible. Filters for project, status, agent, and a search box are present. No console errors detected.

steps.action: Examine task cards in each column
steps.expected: Cards show title, status, agent name (or 'Unclaimed'), and task type
steps.observed: All cards display title, task type label (Feature/Bugfix/Implementation), and agent identifier (UUID or 'Unclaimed')
3 cards: 'Backlog task one' (Feature, aaaaaaaa-...), 'Implement search feature' (Implementation, Unclaimed), 'Setup CI pipeline' (Implementation, b2c3d4e5-...)
2 cards: 'Backlog task two' (Bugfix, aaaaaaaa-...), 'Design new homepage' (Implementation, a1b2c3d4-...)

steps.action: Verify cards in In Progress column
steps.observed: 2 cards: 'In progress task' (Implementation, bbbbbbbb-...), 'Write API documentation' (Bugfix, b2c3d4e5-...)
2 cards: 'Review task' (Feature, aaaaaaaa-...), 'Fix login bug' (Bugfix, a1b2c3d4-...)
2 cards: 'Blocked task' (Feature, bbbbbbbb-...), 'Refactor database layer' (Implementation, b2c3d4e5-...)

evidence.observations: All task cards display title, task type (Feature, Bugfix, or Implementation), and assigned agent (UUID or 'Unclaimed'). Cards are correctly placed in their respective status columns. The 6 seeded tasks are present in the correct columns. Additional tasks (beyond the original 6 seeded) were also visible, all correctly placed. The 'Unclaimed' label is shown for tasks without an assigned agent.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-DASH-001 confirmed all 6 status columns (Backlog, Ready, In Progress, Review, Done, Blocked) are displayed on initial page load with no console errors. VAL-DASH-002 confirmed all task cards show title, task type, agent name (or 'Unclaimed'), and are correctly placed in their respective status columns.
